name: Crockpot Chicken and Cheddar Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in butter and remove it to the crockpot.
2. Brown the ham separately.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients (tomato, onions, basil) with the cream of cheddar soup.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken and ham in the crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on low for 7 to 9 hours, or until the chicken is tender.
Note: Acquired from Jean Allen (GRDG72B) Prodigy December 30, 1991.
